word: H5261 - נְסַךְ - nᵉçak - nes-ak' - Drink offering

sections.paragraph:
Original: נסך

Transliteration: nesak

Phonetic: nes-ak'

BDB Definition:

  1. something poured out, libation, drink offering, libation offering

Origin: corresponding to H5262

TWOT entry: 2866a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
